node.title: Uber SSE frontend ds-algo interview question

topic.title: Uber SSE frontend ds-algo interview question

post.content:
1. Process order string to create a set for every character, basically a map of letter to a set. The set contains all letters that are allowed to come before the key letter.
2. Iterate the long text, keeping every encountered character in a set. At each iteration see if all the previously encountered letters in the long text are there in the current letter's set we built in step 1. If not, the long text doesn't follow the order.

Building the map for step 1 -> Store the previously encountered letters in the order string in a set. The current letter's set will be the letters currently in the set.

Time Complexity
Step 1 -> 26 * 26 -> O(1)
Step 2 -> n * 26 -> O(n)
